case_title: POLLY CHAN VS. SHADDRACH GO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, POLLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GO, SHADDRACH AROMIN, DONNA M. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 15 ROTTECK ST. UPPER UNIT, S.F. CA. 94112, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GO, SHADDRACH

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GO, SHADDRACH AROMIN, DONNA M.
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GO, SHADDRACH AROMIN, DONNA M.
